summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Dice Reaction Story Engine v3.3. 23/23 backend pytest cases pass (100%). Frontend Home → New Story → Play flow end-to-end works on mobile viewport (390x844): D20 hero renders, all 8 genres + custom card present, Begin disabled until genre selected, story creation succeeds in ~25s, Play screen renders paragraphs, choices A-F, state chips (HP/STR/FTG), objective bar, debug block (when debug ON), and inventory ledger modal with all keys (Carried/Worn/Weapons/Supplies/Load/Summary). No MongoDB _id leaks anywhere.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Cosmetic only — not breaking. Likely from react-native-reanimated or Animated.View pointerEvents prop in index.tsx (heroGlow). Safe to ignore or migrate to style.pointerEvents.

action_items: Optional: silence the 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' RN warning by moving pointerEvents into style on Animated.View elements (e.g., heroGlow in app/index.tsx).
Optional cleanup: remove ngrok-related noise from /var/log/supervisor/expo.err.log (CommandError: ngrok tunnel took too long) — does not affect web preview which is bundling and serving correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: All MongoDB queries correctly project out _id ({'_id': 0}). Verified across all 6 endpoints. No leaks.

server.py: logger is defined AFTER routes that reference it (line 503 vs usage at line 365/422). Currently safe because logging.basicConfig + module-level logger resolves at import end before any request, but cleaner to move basicConfig+logger before routes.
server.py: @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan context — non-blocking.
Output parser: choices regex `^([A-F])[\.\)]\s*(.+)$` is strict; if Claude ever returns 'A:' instead of 'A.' parsing returns 0 choices. Currently working in all 23 LLM calls observed.
Hidden D20 verified: with debug_mode=False, narrative contained no 'd20', 'roll:', or 'modifier' tokens (asserted). Debug block correctly omitted when off.
Frontend api.ts uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL via theme.ts API const. No hardcoded URLs.
Frontend uses testID consistently on all interactive elements (verified open-menu-btn, debug-block-{turn_number} naming convention).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows: home load, navigation, genre selection, story start, play render, ledger modal — all green)

seed_data_creation: 2 ephemeral test sessions created during pytest run, deleted via teardown fixtures. 1 session created via UI E2E (TEST_ device_id), retained for inspection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_story_engine.py and run in ~90s (most time is LLM calls). Frontend public URL is at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Use mobile viewport 390x844. Note: play screen debug block testID is `debug-block-{turn_number}` (per-turn), and the menu button is `open-menu-btn` (NOT `menu-btn`). Inventory modal testID is `ledger-modal`. Choices are `choice-A`..`choice-F`. Story creation via UI takes 20-30s — use 90s timeouts on wait_for_url for /play/**.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found requiring RCA. Implementation is solid: persistent MongoDB storage keyed by device_id, hidden D20 mechanics correctly gated behind debug_mode flag, output parser robustly handles Claude's tag-block format, and frontend correctly wires testIDs across all interactive elements.
